channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - insider-gaming.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for insider-gaming.com

item.title: Fortnite Zero Build Patch Notes: All Zero Build Changes, Explained
item.content:encoded:
Fortnite has gone through several periods of evolution over the news, but a major patch on May 14 is bringing wholesale changes to Zero Build.

The Epic Games mode has become a popular approach in Fortnite for players who don’t want to deal with the complexities of the build mechanics, and the May 14 update is an experimental one, making significant changes to Zero Build.

If you want to see details of all the Zero Build changes in Fortnite, Insider Gaming has you covered.

All Fortnite Zero Build Changes

Fortnite has seen some major adjustments made to Zero Build for the final weeks of Season 2, with the experiment set to impact the future of the game.

Landing alongside the huge Overwatch collab, new items have been added to the loot pool, providing more defensive and utility items in rotation. Additionally, there are new Zero Build exclusive items, Improved Smokle Grenades and Brick-a-Bunkers.

There are also no more fall damage eliminations, as lethal fall damage has been removed. Now, a would-be fatal fall triggers a ‘Splat’ animation, dropping your health to 1 HP and removing all shields and overshield.

  • More Insider Gaming: When Will Fortnite Servers Be Back Up?

All of the Fortnite Zero Build patch notes are below, courtesy of Epic Games:

  • New ‘Pocket Items’ have replaced the old Build button. Pocket Items are unlimited-use utility items with cooldowns; you start every match with one equipped and can swap at Vending Machines around the map. Shockwave Grenades, Med Mist Grenades, and Shield Bubbles are the three Pocket Items available at launch.
  • All players now start matches with a Pistol, a Small Shield Potion, and their Pocket Item.
  • You can now rush to the ground from the Battle Bus. Instead of auto-deploying your Glider near the ground, you can manually cut it and free-fall the last stretch. Be careful!
  • Glider Redeploy returns from elevated positions for cleaner rotations across the map.
  • Holding your Pickaxe grants unlimited Stamina so you can cover ground without burning out.
  • Eliminations now restore your Overshield, rewarding aggressive play.
  • Environmental structures now take significantly less damage from weapons. A boulder, a tree, a random shed will all now hold up as much better cover.
  • Reboot Van timers have been reduced so you can get the squad back in faster.

Are The Zero Build Changes Permanent?

No, the changes made on May 15 in Fortnite’s Zero Build are not permanent, instead serving as an ‘experiment’ for the future of the mode.

Zero Build is themed around “pure gunplay”, and Epic Games wants to “push that identity further,” with the experiment bringing in significant changes for the remainder of Season 2.

  • More Insider Gaming: Fortnite Chapter 7 Season 3 Start Date

Player feedback will shape how Zero Build will be adjusted next season and beyond, and for other Battle Royale modes, showing that Epic Games is ready for a full identity change of the mode.

More details will be shared in future and it remains to be seen how these wholesale changes impact the mode.

What do you think of the Zero Build overhaul in Fortnite? Share your thoughts in the Insider Gaming Discord.

For more Fortnite, take a look at all the Rebirth requirements in Droid Tycoon, and check out the full roadmap for Star Wars content in May.

MOBILE APP

item.title: GTA 6 Pre-Order Date Has Allegedly Leaked Via Best Buy
item.content:encoded:
GTA 6 pre-orders are supposedly set to go live next week, starting May 18, 2026, as a Best Buy email has allegedly leaked when you can place your pre-order. Insider Gaming is currently working on verifying the email, but it does appear to have been received by plenty of people online.

Sent out to affiliates, the email reveals the campaign is for none other than the highly anticipated Grand Theft Auto 6, with the pre-orders set to begin on May 18, five months before the game’s November 19 release date. If pre-orders were to go live, it could very well rule out fears of another delay.

Until we get a hold of the email for ourselves, check out this post by GTA6Alerts on X, who has shared a video of the email, as well as live screenshots of others corroborating the news.

GTA 6 Trailer 3 Could Be Around The Corner

The pre-order news has once again got fans online speculating that the highly rumored Trailer 3 could be right around the corner, with many suspecting that the trailer will close with the official pre-order announcement.

The anticipation surrounding GTA 6 has only continued to grow in recent months. It has now been over a year since Rockstar last showed substantial footage of the game, while Trailer 2 has already surpassed 160 million views on YouTube alone.

With excitement at an all-time high and fans desperate for fresh details, the rumored May 18 pre-order date has many believing Rockstar could finally be preparing to pull back the curtain once again.

Will you be pre-ordering GTA 6, whenever it does go live? Share your thoughts in the official Insider Gaming Discord Server.

For more gaming news, read about the major changes made to ARC Raiders’ update schedule, as well as Crimson Desert DLC being considered by Pearl Abyss.

Charlie is one of Insider Gaming's Guides Writers who's been in the gaming industry for a little over a year. Unfortunately for him, he enjoys every video game genre out…

More from Charlie Champion

MOBILE APP

item.title: Today’s Contexto: Hints & Answer For May 14, 2026
item.content:encoded:
Contexto is a word association game that gives you a new word to guess every single day. With every attempt, the AI algorithm determines how close your guess is to the daily answer based on thematic and contextual similarity.

Sometimes, though, no matter how experienced you are, the word you’re looking for can be incredibly vague and hard to deduce. Luckily for you, this guide is full of hints to give you a helping hand, but make sure you give today’s Contexto a go if you haven’t already!

How To Play Contexto

Contexto is incredibly simple to play, but difficult to master. All you have to do is type words into the search bar, and the AI algorithm will tell you how close your word is to the answer.

You’ll know how close your guess is based on the colour of the bar and the number next to it.

  • Red includes guesses with the number 1,501 and above, meaning you’re way off from the secret word.
  • Orange includes guesses between 301 and 1,500, meaning you’re getting closer, but still some ways off.
  • Green includes guesses between 1 and 300, meaning you’re on the right track.

Best Contexto Tips & Tricks

  • Start off using broad terms, then narrow down once you’ve got under the 1,000 mark.
  • Try using Nouns first, and dip into verbs or adjectives once you’ve discovered the context.
  • Experiment with random words at times, especially as different forms of a root word can rank differently, such as work and worker.
  • Guess away, as unlike other word games like Wordle, you aren’t limited to a strict number of attempts.

Best Starting Words For Contexto

Here are some great starting words to get you going with Contexto:

  • Thing
  • Person
  • Place
  • Animal
  • Work
  • Nature
  • Game
  • Concept
  • Idea
  • Food

Contexto Hints For Today, May 14, 2026

Without giving away today’s Contexto answer, here are a few helpful hints to get you thinking in the right direction:

  • Hint 1: Good
  • Hint 2: Okay
  • Hint 3: Alright

If they don’t help, then here are the nine closest words, going from tenth to second:

  • Additional
  • Even
  • One
  • Pay
  • Penalty
  • Fee
  • Charge
  • Citation
  • Ticket

Today’s Contexto Answer For May 14, 2026

If you’ve tried everything and still can’t figure out today’s Contexto answer, then you can find it down below:

Answer: Fine

Fine often means good or good enough, though it can also refer to a financial punishment.

When Is The Next Contexto Game?

Contexto is updated daily at 12 AM or Midnight in your respective time zone, meaning the next game will start on May 15.

The Contexto schedule is very consistent, with a new game releasing at the same time every day.

How did you find today’s Contexto? Share your thoughts in the official Insider Gaming Discord Server.

Charlie is one of Insider Gaming's Guides Writers who's been in the gaming industry for a little over a year. Unfortunately for him, he enjoys every video game genre out…

More from Charlie Champion

item.title: NYT Strands #801 Hints and Answers for Today, May 13, 2026
item.content:encoded:
Strands is a daily word search puzzle game from The New York Times. It is a relatively new game, launched in 2024, in which players seek a common theme among words in a 6×8 letter grid.

Whether it’s your first time playing or you’re a Strands veteran, today’s tips and strategies can help you find words faster. So, if you’ve found yourself stuck with today’s Strands, don’t worry, below you’ll find some helpful hints and even the answers for Strands Game #801 for Wednesday, May 13, 2026

To play today’s Strands, head to the game’s website.

IMPORTANT: The following information includes spoilers on today’s edition of Strands. If you don’t want the answer given to you, stop scrolling.

How To Play Strands

Strands is a daily word search that challenges you to find words with a common theme. There’s also a Spanagram that reveals the deeper theme behind the words.

  • Words that are three letters and under do not count.
  • Words that reveal the correct theme appear in blue.
  • The Spanagram turns yellow when found.
  • Finding three words that don’t fit the theme will reveal a hint to help you find the proper words.

The goal is to string together as many words as possible. Every letter on the grid gets used! Daily puzzles keep players coming back for more, making it a fun brain exercise and a popular online trend.

Strands can only be played on the New York Times website or on the NYT Games app.

Strands Hints For Today, May 13, 2026

The Strands’ answers to the theme of Game #801 are all related to terms that describe one’s readiness to do something or their unmitigated gall.

General Strands Hints For May 13

Without giving today’s Strands answers completely away, here are a few helpful hints for today to get you started:

  • Hint 1: Your doctor might suggest eating more of this if you have constipation issues.
  • Hint 2: This symbol is your life indicator in The Legend of Zelda.
  • Hint 3: When someone is shocked by something that you’ve said or done, they might say you have a lot of this

Use these clues to narrow down your searches and increase your chances of solving Strands #801 for May 13, 2026.

Words to Help You Find Strand Hints for May 13 2026

If you want help getting started without having today’s Strands answer given to you, there are a few starter words worth trying that will help you unlock some in-game hints. A few starter words that may help are:

  • TAKES
  • TAKE
  • MAKES
  • MAKE
  • LUCK

Today’s Strands Answer For Game #801 On May 13, 2026

If you’ve tried everything, including using the above hints, and are still stuck, you can find the answers to today’s Strands below. Check out the answers for past puzzles here.

  • GRIT
  • FIBER
  • HEART
  • PLUCK
  • NERVE
  • GUMPTION
  • SPUNK
  • SPANAGRAM: WHATITTAKES

If you solved today’s Strands without our answers, congratulations! If not, take note of the best tips above for tomorrow’s puzzle, and check back daily for more hints.

When Is The Next Strands Game After #801?

All New York Times games are updated daily at 12 am or Midnight in your respective time zone. Information about the next game is often available in the hours leading up to it, giving players a heads-up. The game on May 14 will be Strands Game #802.

What Is Strands?

Strands is a daily word search puzzle game created by The New York Times. Launched in 2024, Strands challenges players to discover a common theme among words in a 6×8 letter grid. The game’s original concept was developed by Juliette Seive, a research director on The New York Times Games team, with the aim of replicating Wordle’s success. Tracy Bennett serves as the puzzle editor for Strands, overseeing the creation and curation of daily puzzles since its launch.

For even more Insider Gaming delivered straight to your inbox, sign up for our weekly newsletter.

MOBILE APP

Level Up Your Gaming News

Real-time news, exclusive podcasts, push alerts, and a better reading experience.

Available on iOS & Android

item.title: Subnautica 2 Will Be Available on GeForce Now
item.content:encoded:
There is good news for anyone who subscribes to Nvidia GeForce Now and was hoping to get their hands on Subnautica 2 as quickly as possible. The game will be coming to the platform when it releases in Early Access on Steam, Epic Games Store, and Xbox Game Pass on May 14. The announcement was made by the development team on social media on May 13, just one day before release.

More on Subnautica 2’s Early Access Release

Early Access will be available only to PC and Xbox players, but the game is expected to come to other platforms later. In the past, Subnautica and Subnautica: Below Zero both came to PlayStation 5 and PlayStation 4; the initial early access build for the new game has elected to skip Sony platforms for now.

This new game is crafted as a solo experience. However, this time around, you can play online co-op with up to 3 players. The game has already surpassed 5 million wish lists on Steam, and the developers at Unknown Worlds are excited for players to dive into the Early Access experience.

“Subnautica 2 is an underwater survival adventure game set on an all-new alien world. It is the next chapter in the Subnautica universe, developed by Unknown Worlds. Driven from your home by ongoing conflict, Alterra offers you the chance at a new life. But as the colony ship CICADA shepherds you and your fellow Pioneers to your new home, something goes awry. The ship’s AI insists that your mission should continue. Stranded and faced with near-insurmountable odds, you must do everything in your power to survive. The future of humanity on this world is in your hands,” the game’s synopsis states.

For more on everything you need to know ahead of the Early Access release of Subnautica 2, you can check out everything we know about the Early Access roadmap in this handy guide. Insider Gaming will continue to monitor the game in its Early Access phase and report all updates.

Sound off about this story and all others in our official Discord server. Also, don’t forget to sign up for our weekly newsletter.

MOBILE APP

Level Up Your Gaming News

Real-time news, exclusive podcasts, push alerts, and a better reading experience.

Available on iOS & Android

item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Capcom Outlines How Its AI Use Will Allow More Time for Creativity
item.content:encoded:
Capcom has admitted that it will continue researching and using generative AI. However, the company has also outlined what they will use the technology for and how it will allow them to spend more time on creative endeavors and the development of new projects.

On May 13, Capcom announced its financial results for the last quarter of the fiscal year ending in 2026. In its report, Capcom disclosed that its research and use of generative AI are part of its ongoing investments in its popular IPs. As with many companies, they also stated that the technology is primarily utilized to enhance efficiency with the development process.

“As it is crucial to maintain and improve its core strengths, consisting of its proprietary advanced technologies and development capabilities, the Company continues to aggressively pursue growth investments aimed at building its development environment,” said Capcom in its earnings report.

“This includes research and development into cutting-edge technologies such as its proprietary game engine, other development investments, and the use of generative AI to enhance the efficiency and productivity of the game development processes. Through these efforts, the company is working to further expand and deepen the penetration of its content and corporate brand worldwide by consistently releasing content to the market and increasing catalog sales, thereby enhancing its brand value.”

Capcom also provided a graphical representation of how the technology will be utilized moving forward. As part of one of the slides in its earnings presentation, Capcom stated, “AI utilized to improve development efficiency and productivity
A tool to streamline routine tasks, freeing up time for creative work.” This statement was accompanied by a graphic noting that the use of the new technology has freed up time previously spent on research, draft generation, user analysis, interactive manuals, error checks, meeting notes, and more.

The topic of AI in game development has become increasingly prevalent. Sony’s president recently stated that he believes AI will power the future of their games. Read more of those comments here. Sony has also stated that they are working with Bandai Namco to learn how to better use generative AI in the future. Read more about that here.

For more from Capcom, check out further details on their record-breaking fiscal year. Insider Gaming will continue to monitor the story and report any updates as more information becomes available.

MOBILE APP

Level Up Your Gaming News

Real-time news, exclusive podcasts, push alerts, and a better reading experience.

Available on iOS & Android
